name: Trimble Viewpoint Vista Construction ERP API
what_it_does: Trimble Viewpoint Vista enterprise construction ERP REST API for large general contractors and construction managers with integrated job costing, accounting, project management, and compliance. Enables AI agents to manage job cost tracking and committed cost reporting for large-scale construction cost control automation, handle accounts payable, subcontractor payment, and lien waiver collection for enterprise AP workflow automation, access multi-entity general ledger and financial consolidation for enterprise construction financial automation, retrieve certified payroll and prevailing wage compliance for public works and government contract automation, manage equipment asset tracking and maintenance costing for large fleet management automation, handle subcontract management, change orders, and claims management for contract administration automation, access owner billing, AIA applications, and retainage management for enterprise billing automation, retrieve WIP schedule and project financial forecasting for banking and bonding reporting automation, manage field time entry and labor cost allocation for construction workforce automation, and integrate Vista with Procore, Oracle Primavera, Trimble Connect, and banking platforms for enterprise construction ERP ecosystem.
use_cases: Tracking multi-job costs from enterprise construction agents
Processing certified payroll from GC compliance agents
Managing subcontractor AP from enterprise AP agents
Generating WIP reports from bonding and banking agents
not_for: Small specialty subcontractors (use Viewpoint Spectrum or Jonas)
Owner's project management for capital programs
best_when: A large ENR-ranked general contractor or construction manager wanting AI agents to automate multi-entity job costing, certified payroll, subcontractor AP, owner billing, and WIP reporting within Viewpoint Vista as the enterprise construction ERP.
avoid_when: MULTI-ENTITY GL CONSOLIDATION ACCURACY FOR ENTERPRISE REPORTING: Automated multi-entity financial consolidation in Vista must correctly handle intercompany eliminations, equity method investments, and entity-specific overhead allocation; automated consolidation without CPA review creates financial misstatement in enterprise reporting. CERTIFIED PAYROLL MULTI-STATE AND MULTI-PROJECT COMPLIANCE: Automated certified payroll for large GCs with workers on multiple concurrent public works projects in different states must apply correct state-specific prevailing wage schedules and fringe benefit requirements per project and trade; automated certified payroll cross-state project allocation errors create Davis-Bacon and state prevailing wage filing violations. VISTA SQL SERVER DEPENDENCY AND CUSTOMIZATION COMPLEXITY: Vista is built on Microsoft SQL Server with extensive custom table configurations per installation; Vista API queries may return customer-specific custom fields not in standard schema; automated data extraction must handle schema variations across Vista customer installations.

auth.notes: Trimble Viewpoint Vista uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST and Vista Web Services API. Portland, Oregon HQ (Viewpoint, pre-acquisition). Acquired by Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) in 2018 for $1.2B. Vista targets ENR top-400 general contractors and construction managers. 8,000+ Viewpoint customers including Vista, Spectrum, ProContractor. Vista flagship product for large GC. SQL Server based with high customization per installation. Competes with CMiC, Sage 300 CRE, and Oracle Primavera for enterprise construction ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual subscription, significant implementation cost
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; module licensing (GL, AP, AR, payroll, job cost, equipment); significant implementation and customization professional services
pricing.notes: Portland OR / Sunnyvale CA. Trimble NASDAQ:TRMB. Viewpoint acquired 2018 $1.2B. Vista targets large ENR GC. Enterprise annual subscription with significant implementation services.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; complex job cost and payroll queries throttled; no native webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — VISTA EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Viewpoint Vista does not support native webhooks for any business events; all automated workflows require scheduled polling; design polling intervals aligned with Vista daily posting and period-close cycles

VISTA CUSTOM SCHEMA PER INSTALLATION: Vista uses Microsoft SQL Server with customer-specific customizations (custom UDFs, custom tables, custom fields); Vista API and data model varies per installation; automated integrations must be validated against the specific customer's Vista schema, not a generic Vista schema

MULTI-ENTITY INTERCOMPANY ELIMINATION COMPLEXITY: Automated financial consolidation for multi-entity GC organizations in Vista must handle intercompany receivables/payables elimination; automated consolidation without intercompany elimination creates double-counting in enterprise financial reporting reviewed by auditors and lenders

Vista Web Services vs REST API coexistence — Vista has both legacy Vista Web Services (SOAP/XML) and newer REST API endpoints; not all Vista modules are available via REST API; automated workflows may need to use both API types depending on data domain (payroll via Web Services, project via REST)

Period close and fiscal year-end lockout — Vista applies period-close lockout that prevents API writes to closed accounting periods; automated transaction posting must check period-close status before attempting write; post-period-close transaction attempts return errors requiring manual journal entry workaround

Certified payroll multi-project multi-state fringe benefit complexity — large GC automated certified payroll for workers simultaneously on multiple public works projects across states requires project-to-worker assignment tracking with state-specific wage determination per trade per project; Vista certified payroll automation is complex and requires payroll compliance professional validation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise construction ERP. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US/CA/AU. Financial, payroll, and job cost data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise construction ERP. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US/CA/AU. Payroll, financial, and job costing data.
